name_cn:
Top-tier replica with full packaging
Autumn/Winter Latest Boston Series, Classic Return, Romantic Feel, Carefully crafted with blue oblique letter embroidery fabric, double flap design, adorned with a rotary letter buckle, exquisite and unique, spacious internal compartment to hold various daily items, handle design convenient for hand carrying, paired with adjustable leather shoulder strap, can be worn on shoulder or crossbody
size:20*12*16cm
